name: landmarked
description: A full-stack scaffold for a premium travel journaling platform: 3D interactive globe (CesiumJS), one-click travel markers, trip journals, a scrapbook-style photo album, social features (follows/likes/comments), weather + currency widgets, and expense tracking.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.preview-all: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run server" "npm run preview"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install

author: Saumya Pandey
